title: Custom Score Numbers
description: Remove the red numbers in the scoreboard or change the color
body:
Only works with 1.20.3+ Servers & 1.20.3+ Clients

Not a Resourcepack ❌ • Not a Shader ❌ • Not a Mod ❌ • Just a plugin ✅
Check out Packet Events which made this plugin possible!
## Installation Just put the plugin into your plugins folder and restart your server. _All of your scoreboards_ will now have the custom score numbers applied! ## Works on: - **Spigot, Paper & Purpur** - **Velocity & Bungeecord** ## Limits: - **Only works with 1.20.3+ Servers & 1.20.3+ Clients** - Not really compatible with geyser (Does not work for Bedrock players)
More detailed information about performance and compatibility ### How does it work? This plugin modifies all scoreboard objective packets sent by the server. For more details look into the source code [here](https://github.com/max1mde/CustomScoreNumbers) ### Performance? Should not be an issue because it just modifies a specific packet. #### Important! This plugin only works on version 1.20.3 or above (For a reason (not because I am lazy ; ) ) )! If you are using via backwards... IT DOES NOT work with older clients than 1.20.3 too!
CustomScoreNumbers/config.yml ```yaml ScoreNumbers: Invisible: true Color: "#04FFF9" ``` (The color is only applied if Invisible is set to false) /customscores reload (Reloads the config)
Permission: CustomScores.commands
